notes: Two-leg EURUSD/EURAUD market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar and has negative DEV Sharpe, but it is the strongest remaining unbuilt OOS-positive pair after the existing 12532/12533/12624/12712/12723/12728/12731/12732/12735/12739/12747/12749 baskets.

Q02 uses USD tester currency and the canonical RISK_FIXED=1000 budget. EURUSD.DWX and EURAUD.DWX are the traded legs; AUDUSD.DWX is declared only as custom-symbol conversion history for USD-denominated EURAUD accounting.

Repair note 2026-07-03: the EA already selects and warms AUDUSD.DWX in Strategy_EnsureBasketScope(); the manifest now declares that conversion history so Q02 history scope matches the runtime contract.
